page.notFoundBody: The page you requested does not exist.
page.forbiddenBody: You do not have access to this area.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error prevented this view from rendering. You can try again, or refresh the page.

global.title: Unexpected error
global.description: A background error occurred. Please try again.

auth.invalidSession: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

validation.failed: Some fields are invalid. Please review and try again.

network.offline: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
